glosses.ja: 発見する; 見つける

sentences.target: Ich will heute den Markt entdecken.

translations.de: Ich will heute den Markt entdecken.
translations.en: I want to explore the market today.
translations.fr: Aujourd'hui, je veux explorer le marché.
translations.ru: Сегодня я хочу прогуляться по рынку.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi muốn khám phá khu chợ.
translations.nl: Vandaag wil ik de markt verkennen.
translations.hi: आज मैं बाज़ार घूमना चाहता हूँ।
translations.el: Σήμερα θέλω να κάνω μια βόλτα στην αγορά.
translations.nb: I dag vil jeg utforske markedet.
translations.id: Hari ini aku ingin jalan-jalan di pasar.
translations.sv: I dag vill jag utforska marknaden.
translations.da: I dag vil jeg udforske markedet.
translations.ja: 今日は市場を見て回りたい。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular personal pronoun in nominative case; subject of the clause.
Finite modal auxiliary (present, 1st sg) selecting a bare infinitive at clause end; agrees with the subject 'Ich'.
Temporal adverb indicating the time of the action.
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; marks the direct object 'Markt'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'entdecken'.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; non-finite complement of the modal 'will'. Inseparable-prefix verb meaning 'to discover'.

sentences.target: Im Park kann man viel entdecken.

translations.de: Im Park kann man viel entdecken.
translations.en: You can discover a lot in the park.
translations.es: En el parque hay mucho por descubrir.
translations.fr: On peut découvrir beaucoup de choses au parc.
translations.it: Nel parco c'è tanto da scoprire.
translations.zh-Hans: 公园里有很多可以发现的东西。
translations.yue: 喺公園可以發現好多嘢。
translations.ru: В парке можно много интересного найти.
translations.pt: No parque há muito para descobrir.
translations.vi: Trong công viên có rất nhiều điều để khám phá.
translations.ar: في الحديقة الكثير مما يمكن اكتشافه.
translations.nl: In het park is veel te ontdekken.
translations.uk: У парку можна багато чого відкрити.
translations.hu: A parkban sok mindent fel lehet fedezni.
translations.hi: पार्क में बहुत कुछ खोजने को है.
translations.el: Στο πάρκο μπορείς να ανακαλύψεις πολλά.
translations.nb: I parken er det mye å oppdage.
translations.id: Di taman ada banyak yang bisa ditemukan.
translations.sv: I parken finns det mycket att upptäcka.
translations.ro: În parc e mult de descoperit.
translations.cs: V parku lze objevit spoustu věcí.
translations.da: I parken er der meget at opdage.
translations.ja: 公園には発見がたくさんある。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition governing dative, introducing a locative PP.
Common noun, masculine dative singular as object of the preposition 'Im'. Forms a topicalized locative PP in sentence-initial position.
Finite modal auxiliary (present, 3rd sg) in V2 position; selects a bare infinitive.
Impersonal pronoun functioning as the grammatical subject (3rd person singular).
Quantifying adverb modifying the verb phrase; indicates a large amount/extent of discovering.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; non-finite complement of the modal 'kann'. Inseparable-prefix verb.

translations.en: We want to discover new cafés.
translations.fr: Nous voulons découvrir de nouveaux cafés.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们想去找些新的咖啡馆。
translations.yue: 我哋想搵啲新嘅咖啡店。
translations.ru: Мы хотим открывать для себя новые кафе.
translations.he: אנחנו רוצים לגלות בתי קפה חדשים.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi muốn khám phá những quán cà phê mới.
translations.uk: Ми хочемо відкривати для себе нові кав'ярні.
translations.hi: हम नए कैफ़े ढूँढ़ना चाहते हैं।
translations.ja: 新しいカフェを見つけたいです。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person plural personal pronoun in nominative case; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (Konjunktiv II, present, 1st pl) expressing polite/attenuated desire; selects a bare infinitive.
Attributive adjective modifying 'Cafés'; strong inflection, accusative plural, agreeing with the head noun.
Common noun, plural accusative; direct object of 'entdecken'.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; non-finite complement of the modal 'möchten'. Inseparable-prefix verb.

sentences.target: Sie will im Urlaub mehr entdecken.

translations.de: Sie will im Urlaub mehr entdecken.
translations.en: She wants to discover more on vacation.
translations.fr: En vacances, elle veut découvrir davantage.
translations.it: In vacanza vuole scoprire di più.
translations.ko: 여행에서 더 많이 둘러보고 싶어 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 她想在假期里发现更多。
translations.yue: 佢想喺旅行時發掘更多。
translations.ru: В отпуске она хочет открыть для себя больше.
translations.pt: Nas férias ela quer descobrir mais.
translations.tr: Tatilde daha çok şey keşfetmek istiyor.
translations.vi: Khi đi nghỉ, cô ấy muốn khám phá nhiều hơn.
translations.ar: في الإجازة تريد أن تكتشف المزيد.
translations.nl: Op vakantie wil ze meer ontdekken.
translations.uk: У відпустці вона хоче відкрити для себе більше.
translations.hi: छुट्टियों में वह और ज़्यादा खोजना चाहती है।
translations.el: Στις διακοπές θέλει να ανακαλύψει περισσότερα.
translations.nb: På ferie vil hun oppdage mer.
translations.id: Saat liburan dia ingin menemukan lebih banyak.
translations.sv: På semestern vill hon upptäcka mer.
translations.ro: În vacanță vrea să descopere mai mult.
translations.da: På ferie vil hun opdage mere.
translations.ja: 休暇中はもっといろいろ見て回りたい。

tokens.explanation: 3rd-person singular personal pronoun in nominative case; subject of the clause (here interpreted as 'she').
Finite modal auxiliary (present, 3rd sg) selecting a bare infinitive at clause end; agrees with 'Sie'.
Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition governing dative, introducing a temporal/locative PP ('on vacation').
Common noun, masculine dative singular as object of the preposition 'im'.
Degree/quantity adverb modifying the verb phrase; indicates a greater amount of discovering.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; non-finite complement of the modal 'will'. Inseparable-prefix verb.

We want to discover new cafés.
She wants to discover more on vacation.
